name: ciper-agent
description: Local AI coding agent using Ollama — full GitHub Copilot Agent parity

ciperAgent.model.description: Default model for chat and agent mode

ciperAgent.completionModel.description: Model for inline completions (leave empty to use main model)

ciperAgent.contextTokenBudget.description: Maximum tokens to use for workspace context

ciperAgent.maxAgentIterations.description: Maximum agent loop iterations before stopping

ciperAgent.completionDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay in ms before triggering inline completion

ciperAgent.requireApprovalForEdits.description: Show diff preview and require approval before applying file changes

ciperAgent.orchestratorModel.description: Model used by the orchestrator (circler) agent for planning and synthesis. Defaults to ciperAgent.model if empty. Use a larger model here for better reasoning quality.

ciperAgent.workerModel.description: Lightweight model used by worker sub-agents for focused single tasks. Defaults to ciperAgent.model if empty. Set to a smaller model (e.g. qwen2.5-coder:3b) on machines with limited VRAM.

ciperAgent.workerNumCtx.description: Context window (KV cache slots) allocated per worker agent. Set to 4096 on 4 GB VRAM machines to reduce memory usage. Workers handle focused sub-tasks and rarely need large context.

ciperAgent.maxWorkerAgents.description: Maximum number of worker sub-agents that can run concurrently. Lower this (e.g. 2) on machines with less VRAM to avoid memory pressure.

ciperAgent.ragEnabled.description: Enable semantic RAG context retrieval. Requires an embedding model to be pulled (e.g. `ollama pull nomic-embed-text`). When enabled, relevant code chunks are retrieved and injected into the orchestrator context before planning.

ciperAgent.embeddingModel.description: Ollama embedding model used for RAG indexing. Must be pulled separately: `ollama pull nomic-embed-text`. Works on CPU — does not require a GPU.

ciperAgent.ragTopK.description: Number of code chunks retrieved by RAG per query. Higher values give more context but use more tokens in the orchestrator prompt.
